title: Hand Warmers Rechargeable 2 Pack, 2 in 1 Electric Handwarmers Reusable, Hand Warmer 24 Hrs Warmth 3 Levels Heat Portable Pocket Heater, Double-Sided Heating Warmers Great for Winter Gift
features: 【2 IN 1 Hand Warmer】Tiema offers a unique split design pair of hand warmers. The magical magnetic attraction design can be divided into two independent hand warmers, or they can be combined into a two-in-one hand warmer with double-sided heating function. In just 2 seconds, you can enjoy all-around warmth from palms to fingertips.

【3 Adjustable Modes & Instant Heat & Lasting Warmth】To stable and safe heating, we use premium chipset to control hand warmers' heat levels. 2 seconds fast heating, 3 levels of temperatures 100-104°F/109-113°F/118-122°F at your choice, to achieve stable, adjustable, precise and comfortable heating effect. Enjoy the warmth and comfort of the portable pocket heater hand warmer，provide up to 24 hours of heat.

【USB Fast Charging, Safety First】The usb hand warmer is made of high-tech lithium battery, aluminum, and ABS material. Built-in intelligent protection system that is provided with the safeguard of power on, short circuit and overloading, etc. It features a substantial lithium battery with a USB-C port. Both hand warmers can fully charge in just 3-4 hours, saving you time and providing you with even more warmth.

【Easy Operation】This hand warmer is easy to operate. Simply press and hold the button for 3 seconds to turn on or off the hand warmer. The red light is on to indicate that it is working press the button once to increase the heat by one step. Double-click the battery indicator will light up a blue light, the number of blue light indicates the power status, one blue light is 0-35%, two blue lights is 36-70%, and three blue lights is 71-100%.

【Perfect Gift】Our modern and cozy hand warmer will keep you and your loved ones warm in this chilly winter! It not only provide warmth to the hands, feet, stomach, waist, knees and other parts in cold environments, but is also very suitable for the elderly, children, outdoor enthusiasts, and people in severe cold conditions. the Tiema hand warmer is bound to be your new favorite.
